items.title: Why Michael Olise is the key to France's World Cup...
items.summary: It's all eyes on Olise after Didier Deschamps finally called the Bayern Munich star up to the France senior side.

items.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Saudi Arabia vs Uruguay LIVE updates: Group H match gets underway
items.summary: After securing a famous win in their opening game at the last World Cup, Saudi Arabia aims to repeat the heroics heroics against Uruguay in their Group H opener on June 15, 2026.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Walter century hunts down Foxes to send Essex top
